path: Theory of computation
description: Umbrella for the mathematical foundations of computing, including complexity, algorithms, logic, automata, and semantics.

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography
description: Umbrella for the study of resource bounds on computation and the cryptographic primitives and protocols built on hardness assumptions.

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography → Algebraic complexity theory
description: Covers complexity of algebraic computations such as polynomial evaluation, matrix multiplication, and arithmetic circuits.

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography → Circuit complexity
description: Concerned with lower and upper bounds on the size and depth of Boolean circuits computing given functions.

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography → Communication complexity
description: Studies the amount of communication required between parties to jointly compute a function of distributed inputs.

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography → Complexity classes

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography → Problems, reductions and completeness

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography → Proof complexity

path: Theory of computation → Computational complexity and cryptography → Quantum complexity theory
